zh.lifeSummary: John Clarke於大約1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他於1664年與Rebecca Marvin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和11個女兒的父母。他去世於1712年11月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓享年83歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德哈特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Clarke于大约1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他于1664年与Rebecca Marvin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和11个女儿的父母。他去世于1712年11月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓享年83岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: """Farmington was originally inhabited by the Tunxis Indian tribe. In June of 1640, a community of English immigrants was established by residents of Hartford, making Farmington the oldest inland settlement west of the Connecticut River and the twelfth oldest community in the state."" Wikipedia"

en.lifeSummary: John Clarke was born about 1630, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. He married Rebecca Marvin in 1664, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 11 daughters. He died on 22 November 1712, in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 83, and was buried in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

Il a épousé Rebecca Marvin en 1664, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 11 filles. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1712, à Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

Lui sposato Rebecca Marvin nel 1664, nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 11 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Clarkeは約1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで生まれた。1664年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードでRebecca Marvinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼は1712年11月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードファルミントンで83歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드
ko.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌
ko.Farmington, New Haven, Connecticut, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐
ko.Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, Unite: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 왓르버이
ko.Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴
ko.Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴
ko.lifeSummary: John Clarke(은)는 대략 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 태어났다. 그는 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 Rebecca Marvin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1712년 11월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Clarke nasceu aproximadamente 1630, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Marvin em 1664, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 11 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1712, em Farmington, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: John Clarke родился около 1630 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Marvin в 1664 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 11 дочерей. Он умер 22 ноября 1712 г. в местности фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: John Clarke nació aproximadamente 1630, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Se casó con Rebecca Marvin en 1664, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1712, en Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
